utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 items with entries. Now check if each is fully specified according to what should be covered: (1) property: includes selected property with details and price (address, bedrooms, bathrooms, school district, price) – fully specified. (2) financing: financing solution with terms – includes loan amount, arrangement fee, interest rate range, term, estimated monthly payment – sufficiently specified. (3) legal_services: legal services with costs – includes essential legal package and full structural survey with costs – acceptable. (4) moving_services: moving arrangements with costs – includes standard moving with cost – acceptable. (5) setup_services: utility and setup services – includes basic utilities connection with cost – acceptable. (6) total_budget: complete cost breakdown – includes property price, down payment available, loan amount, legal, survey, moving, utility setup, financing fee, and total initial cash outlay for services/fees – acceptable as a breakdown. Therefore, all 6/6 items are included and reasonably fully specified.
